name: Bug report
about: Something in the lalim CLI doesn't work as expected
title: ""
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**To reproduce**
The exact command(s) you ran, e.g. `lalim connect --character leon --token …`.

**Expected**
What you expected to happen.

**Environment**
- `lalim --version` (or `@lalim/cli` version):
- OS + arch:
- Node version (`node -v`):
- Inference backend (local llama-server / OpenAI / OpenRouter / …):

**Logs**
Relevant CLI output (redact tokens/keys).
